component.name: Linux Dev Home
component.summary: Developer dashboard for Linux (Docker, metrics, Git, terminal)

description.p: Linux Dev Home is an open-source desktop dashboard inspired by Microsoft Dev Home and VS Code–style visuals. It surfaces Docker containers, host metrics, bundled compose profiles, Git workflows, and an embedded terminal.
Distribution is intended to be Flatpak-first for cross-distro compatibility.
Initial public skeleton: Electron UI, Docker integration, metrics, compose profiles, Git, terminal.
